title: butea laotica
intro: Butea laotica, also known as the red kwao krua or red lotus, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Thailand and Laos. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Butea laotica include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, capsules, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
